sentences.text: The scroll test: "You're scrolling a feed at 11pm, tired.
Which of these 10 headlines makes you stop?
Be brutal" — AI as jaded reader is surprisingly honest
The promise audit: "Does the content fully deliver what this headline promises?"
Real-world scoreboard: track which headline styles win YOUR audience's clicks (email subjects and social posts are free testing grounds), and feed winners back into future prompts
